Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given a textual description of a hiring process and are asked to produce two POWL models one that captures the potential unfairness with an XOR branch for community affiliation and one without unfairness all applicants undergo the same cultural fit evaluation Well break down the process steps from the description Steps in the process with activities 1 ReceiveApplication implicit but we start with the application submission 2 DataCompletenessCheck which includes a loop for missing information 3 SkillAssessment 4 CulturalFitCheck but in the unfair model there is an XOR choice between a standard check and a community affiliation check 5 ManagerialReview 6 FinalDecision

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We are to create two models Model 1 with potential unfairness After the skill assessment we have an XOR choice between two paths Path A Standard cultural fit evaluation CulturalFitCheck Path B CommunityAffiliationCheck which gives an advantage Then both paths lead to ManagerialReview and then FinalDecision Model 2 without unfairness All applicants go through the same steps after skill assessment everyone does CulturalFitCheck without any alternative path for community affiliation then ManagerialReview then FinalDecision

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We also have a loop for data completeness after the initial data check if information is missing we request more info RequestMoreInfo and then check again until complete We can model the initial data check and the loop as data_loop = OperatorPOWL operator=Operator.LOOP children=[DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo]

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: But note the loop in POWL is defined as execute A then either exit the loop or execute B and then A again So we want to check completeness A if incomplete then request more info B and then check again A Alternatively we can model the data completeness check as a XOR choice between a silent transition skip and a sequence of RequestMoreInfo and then DataCompletenessCheck again But that would be more complex The loop operator is designed for this

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Well use the loop operator for the data completeness

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Model 1 with unfairness Steps 1 ReceiveApplication 2 DataCompletenessCheck loop with RequestMoreInfo 3 SkillAssessment 4 XOR choice either CulturalFitCheck or CommunityAffiliationCheck 5 ManagerialReview 6 FinalDecision We can represent this as root = StrictPartialOrder nodes=[ReceiveApplication data_loop SkillAssessment cultural_xor ManagerialReview FinalDecision] root.order.add_edge ReceiveApplication data_loop data_loop SkillAssessment SkillAssessment cultural_xor cultural_xor ManagerialReview ManagerialReview FinalDecision Where data_loop = OperatorPOWL operator=Operator.LOOP children=[DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo] cultural_xor = OperatorPOWL operator=Operator.XOR children=[CulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck] This is exactly the XOR

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Model 2 without unfairness We remove the XOR and have all applicants go through CulturalFitCheck Steps 1 ReceiveApplication 2 DataCompletenessCheck loop 3 SkillAssessment 4 CulturalFitCheck for everyone 5 ManagerialReview 6 FinalDecision So root = StrictPartialOrder nodes=[ReceiveApplication data_loop SkillAssessment CulturalFitCheck ManagerialReview FinalDecision] root.order.add_edge ReceiveApplication data_loop data_loop SkillAssessment SkillAssessment CulturalFitCheck CulturalFitCheck ManagerialReview ManagerialReview FinalDecision Where data_loop is the same as above

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Lets write the code for both models Well create two separate scripts Note We are to use the classes from pm4py.objects.powl.obj and pm4py.objects.process_tree.obj.Operator Well define the activities as Transition objects Lets code accordingly We assume that the process starts with receiving the application which includes resume and questionnaire Then the data completeness check which is the resume parsing and initial data check Well now write the code for both models
